title: Block Breakers 2
description: A simple mod what allows you to break a block in front of it
body:
It is a very simple mod what allows you to break a block in front of it
It only breaks the block in front of it if a redstone signal powers it on
 
What did I change?



The License to GPLv3

and the fabric.mod.json to allow it to run on the versions i specified it for

 

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Description of Block Breakers by bbpower
A very small mod that ports the old Redpower2 block breakers to 1.16.

This mod is for Fabric on Minecraft version 1.16.x. This mod requires the Fabric API.

A block breaker is crafted the same way it was in RP2 and can be used to automate simple tasks, such as automatic cobblestone generation

 

The block breaker breaks the block in front of it when powered with redstone. It spits the item dropped out of its back or directly into an attached chest.
